allow: Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN='sbp_ebbd721912e0f7b5051572584107265e9274eecf' npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT table_name, table_type FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name;")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN='sbp_ebbd721912e0f7b5051572584107265e9274eecf' npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT ''branches'' as t, count\(*\) FROM branches UNION ALL SELECT ''members_legacy'', count\(*\) FROM members_legacy UNION ALL SELECT ''membership_whitelist'', count\(*\) FROM membership_whitelist UNION ALL SELECT ''memberships'', count\(*\) FROM memberships UNION ALL SELECT ''profiles'', count\(*\) FROM profiles UNION ALL SELECT ''redemptions'', count\(*\) FROM redemptions UNION ALL SELECT ''tokens'', count\(*\) FROM tokens;")
